title: GroundingInfo
description: The STATIC, repo-independent integration contract of the code-grounding oracle (epic 8f6c, story S5), emitted by `rebar grounding-info --output json` / the `grounding_info` MCP read tool. A fast, deterministic discovery surface for the oracle's consumers (5fd2 DET floor, 9da1 Pass-2 reviewers): the closed dimension-ID vocabulary + its version, the reference kinds, the closed abstain-reason enum and the outcome/job/tier vocabularies, and the available backends with their DETECTED availability/version. No repo is scanned; only fail-open tool-version probes run.

dimensions_version.description: Monotonic version of the closed dimension vocabulary; bumps on any add/remove.

dimensions.description: The CANONICAL closed set of applicability/overlay dimension IDs a consumer passes to `applies()` and a detector declares (owned by rebar.grounding.oracle.DIMENSIONS).

reference_kinds.description: The closed reference-in `kind` set the refutation surface routes on (defined in S2; exposed here).

abstain_reasons.description: The CLOSED structured abstain-reason enum every backend draws from (mirrors the grounding evidence contract).

backends.description: One entry per oracle backend with its detected availability/version (fail-open: an absent tool reports available=false with a null version).
